hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息；【FINANCE】美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时；【FINANCE】沃伦·巴菲特 (Warren巴菲特) 在 3 月份向 CNBC 戏称这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点。

items.title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
items.summary: A majority of officials anticipated that interest rate increases would be necessary if the Iran war continued to aggravate inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息
items.summary_zh: 大多数官员预计，如果伊朗战争继续加剧通胀，则有必要加息。

items.title: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms see increasing odds that an interest rate hike from the central bank comes by July 2027.
items.title_zh: 美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，央行在 2027 年 7 月之前加息的可能性越来越大。

items.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
items.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特 (Warren巴菲特) 在 3 月份向 CNBC 戏称这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点
items.summary_zh: 三月份，当被问及伯克希尔是否仍在投入资金时，巴菲特表示，该集团已经进行了“一笔小额收购”。

items.title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rises further, WHO warns
items.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，随着死亡人数进一步上升，埃博拉疫苗可能需要九个月的时间
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。

items.title: Bitcoin miners tied to AI rise as Nvidia posts big earnings beat and strong outlook
items.summary: Nvidia's stronger-than-expected results and bullish AI outlook lifted crypto mining stocks tied to data center and high-performance computing demand, even as the chipmaker's shares fell due to growth concerns.
items.title_zh: 随着英伟达公布大幅盈利和强劲前景，比特币矿工与人工智能崛起相关
items.summary_zh: 英伟达强于预期的业绩和乐观的人工智能前景提振了与数据中心和高性能计算需求相关的加密矿业股票，尽管该芯片制造商的股价因增长担忧而下跌。

items.title: Why Trump's bitcoin ETF plans likely collapsed before getting off the ground
items.summary: Trump Media withdrew its bitcoin ETF filing as analysts pointed to fee pressure, weak demand and fierce competition in the crowded spot bitcoin ETF market.
items.title_zh: 为什么特朗普的比特币 ETF 计划可能在启动之前就失败了
items.summary_zh: 由于分析师指出费用压力、需求疲软以及拥挤的现货比特币 ETF 市场的激烈竞争，特朗普媒体 (Trump Media) 撤回了比特币 ETF 备案。

items.title: Hyperliquid ETFs draw $22.3 million in early inflows, analysts point to ‘good sign of organic interest’
items.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs have outpaced bitcoin and ether funds in adjusted inflows during parts of their early trading.
items.title_zh: 分析师指出，超流动性 ETF 在早期流入中吸引了 2230 万美元，这是“有机兴趣的良好迹象”
items.summary_zh: 在部分早期交易中，超流动性 ETF 的调整流入量已经超过了比特币和以太基金。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
items.summary: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴展示更强大的真武AI芯片、新法学硕士
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴宣布对其人工智能产品进行更新，包括更强大的芯片和新的大型语言模型。

items.title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.summary: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
items.title_zh: 英伟达财报电话大戏：习近平峰会后黄仁勋会谈论“特朗普”和中国芯片吗？
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
items.summary: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.
items.title_zh: 以色列极右翼部长因嘲笑戴手铐的加沙船队活动人士而受到谴责
items.summary_zh: 法国和意大利等国批评了一段视频，该视频显示伊塔马尔·本格维尔嘲讽了被拘留在以色列港口的数十名活动人士。

items.title: Tesla Cybertruck driver arrested after driving into lake to use 'wade mode', police say
items.summary: Police said the vehicle was abandoned by the driver after it took on water near the shoreline of Grapevine Lake in north Texas.
items.title_zh: 警方称，特斯拉赛博卡车司机因使用“涉水模式”驶入湖中而被捕
items.summary_zh: 警方表示，这辆车在德克萨斯州北部格雷普韦恩湖海岸线附近进水后被司机遗弃。

items.title: How Iran Gained Leverage in the War
items.summary: Outmatched militarily, Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz. It points to a long-term U.S. vulnerability.
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何在战争中获得影响力
items.summary_zh: 在军事上处于劣势的伊朗利用“三角胁迫”攻击海湾国家并关闭霍尔木兹海峡。它指出了美国的长期脆弱性。

items.title: Video Shows Itamar Ben-Gvir Taunting Pro-Palestinian Activists
items.summary: The national security minister, Itamar Ben-Gvir, posted a video in which he is seen with handcuffed activists forced to kneel on the deck of a ship. It drew a rebuke from Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
items.title_zh: 视频显示伊塔马尔·本·格维尔嘲讽亲巴勒斯坦活动人士
items.summary_zh: 国家安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔(Itamar Ben-Gvir)发布了一段视频，视频中可以看到他和戴着手铐的活动人士被迫跪在一艘船的甲板上。它遭到了总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡的谴责。

items.title: Iran Threatens to Strike Beyond the Middle East if the U.S. Resumes Attacks
items.summary: The warning was issued as President Trump and Vice President JD Vance say progress is being made toward a deal, while keeping open the threat of renewed strikes.
items.title_zh: 如果美国恢复袭击，伊朗威胁将袭击中东以外地区
items.summary_zh: 发出这一警告之际，特朗普总统和副总统万斯表示，达成协议正在取得进展，同时仍面临新一轮罢工的威胁。

items.title: Polymarket moves to list parlays while SEC seeks public input on prediction market ETFs
items.summary: The "combinatorial outcome contracts" would resolve if every part of an underlying contract resolved, according to a filing.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 开始上市连本带利，而 SEC 则寻求公众对预测市场 ETF 的意见
items.summary_zh: 根据一份文件，如果基础合同的每个部分都得到解决，“组合结果合同”就会得到解决。

items.title: Federal Reserve proposes limited master accounts long pursued by crypto firms
items.summary: The U.S. Fed issued a revised proposal on the structure of payment accounts, taking the next step to build on an earlier pitch for so-called skinny accounts.
items.title_zh: 美联储提议加密货币公司长期追求的有限主账户
items.summary_zh: 美联储发布了关于支付账户结构的修订提案，在之前所谓的瘦账户的基础上采取了下一步行动。

items.title: Prediction markets firms take heat in Senate Commerce hearing scrutinizing surge
items.summary: Sports betting on firms such as Kalshi was the focus of questions over advertising to children, cheating from athletes and undermining regulated gaming.
items.title_zh: 预测市场公司在参议院商务听证会上受到关注激增
items.summary_zh: 针对 Kalshi 等公司的体育博彩是向儿童做广告、欺骗运动员以及破坏博彩监管等问题的焦点。

items.title: The Protocol: Ethereum Foundation's high-profile departures spark fresh debate
items.summary: Also: Citi on quantum computing and bitcoin, Jump Crypto’s Firedancer, and Vitalik Buterin on AI verification
items.title_zh: 协议：以太坊基金会的高调离职引发新的争论
items.summary_zh: 另外：花旗谈量子计算和比特币、Jump Crypto 的 Firedancer 和 Vitalik Buterin 谈人工智能验证

items.title: MoneyGram named ‘anchor remittance validator’ for Stripe-backed Tempo blockchain
items.summary: MoneyGram will help validate remittance transactions on the Layer 1 blockchain and integrate stablecoin settlement for its global flows.
items.title_zh: MoneyGram 被命名为 Stripe 支持的 Tempo 区块链的“锚定汇款验证器”
items.summary_zh: MoneyGram 将帮助验证第一层区块链上的汇款交易，并为其全球流动整合稳定币结算。

items.title: Catena Labs lands $30 million Series A, files for national trust bank charter to underpin agentic finance
items.summary: Sean Neville's Catena Labs closed a $30 million Series A to build governed infrastructure for AI agent financial transactions.
items.title_zh: Catena Labs 获得 3000 万美元 A 轮融资，并申请国家信托银行执照以支持代理融资
items.summary_zh: Sean Neville 的 Catena Labs 完成了 3000 万美元的 A 轮融资，旨在为人工智能代理金融交易构建受监管的基础设施。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
items.summary: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.
items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX held 18,712 bitcoin at fair value of $1.29 billion at end of Q1, IPO filing shows
items.summary: The rocket and satellite company is looking to go public at a valuation of more than $1.5 trillion.
items.title_zh: IPO 文件显示，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 截至第一季度末持有 18,712 枚比特币，公允价值为 12.9 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 这家火箭和卫星公司正寻求以超过 1.5 万亿美元的估值上市。

items.title: Latest Congressional swing at crypto tax reform would direct IRS to review de minimis exemptions
items.summary: The newest version of the Parity Act updates language around payment stablecoins and directs the IRS to report on how a de minimis exemption might work.
items.title_zh: 国会对加密货币税收改革的最新摇摆将指示国税局审查最低限度的豁免
items.summary_zh: 最新版本的《平价法案》更新了有关支付稳定币的语言，并指示美国国税局报告最低限度豁免的运作方式。

items.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds $1.45 billion worth of bitcoin as firm looks to go public
items.summary: A stockpile of over 18,000 would make Elon Musk's SpaceX the seventh-largest Bitcoin holder, ahead of Coinbase.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 持有价值 14.5 亿美元的比特币，该公司寻求上市
items.summary_zh: 超过 18,000 枚的库存将使埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 成为第七大比特币持有者，领先于 Coinbase。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin mirrors 2022 bear market pattern as sentiment turns ‘extremely bearish’
items.summary: Bitcoin’s recent rally hit resistance at the 200-day MA near $82,400, a pattern CryptoQuant said is similar to the March 2022 bear market.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示比特币反映了 2022 年熊市模式，情绪变得“极度悲观”
items.summary_zh: 比特币最近的反弹在 82,400 美元附近的 200 日均线处遇到阻力，CryptoQuant 表示这一模式与 2022 年 3 月的熊市类似。

items.title: David Bailey’s Nakamoto bitcoin treasury announces 1-for-40 reverse split as shares hit new lows
items.summary: Nakamoto’s reverse split will shrink outstanding shares to about 17.4 million from roughly 696 million, following a 99.5% price drop.
items.title_zh: 大卫·贝利 (David Bailey) 的中本比特币金库宣布，随着股价创下新低，40 股中的 1 股反向分拆
items.summary_zh: Nakamoto’s reverse split will shrink outstanding shares to about 17.4 million from roughly 696 million, following a 99.5% price drop.

items.title: Kik founder’s latest app Flipcash first to tap Coinbase’s stablecoin-as-a-service platform
items.summary: Coinbase rolled out its Custom Stablecoin platform in late 2025 to enable companies to launch branded stablecoins.
items.title_zh: Kik 创始人的最新应用程序 Flipcash 率先利用 Coinbase 的稳定币即服务平台
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 于 2025 年底推出了定制稳定币平台，使公司能够推出品牌稳定币。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
items.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
items.title_zh: Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 引入企业代理工作流程
items.summary_zh: 在该模型在 OfficeQA Pro 基准测试中树立了新的技术水平后，Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 用于企业代理工作流程。

items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
items.title_zh: AWS 上的基础模型训练和推理的构建块

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5：前沿情报与行动
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
items.summary: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.
items.title_zh: OpenAI在AI IPO赛马中领先：“首先进入公开市场非常重要”
items.summary_zh: 此前有报道称，这家人工智能巨头和 ChatGPT 所有者最快将于本周秘密申请 IPO。

items.title: Fintech firm Mercury hits $5.2 billion valuation after funding round, up 49% in 14 months
items.summary: Mercury has emerged as one of a select group of fintech firms, like Ramp and Stripe, that continued to thrive after the collapse of pandemic-era valuations.
items.title_zh: 金融科技公司 Mercury 在本轮融资后估值达到 52 亿美元，14 个月内上涨 49%
items.summary_zh: Mercury 已成为 Ramp 和 Stripe 等精选金融科技公司之一，这些公司在大流行时代估值崩溃后继续蓬勃发展。

items.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
items.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.
items.title_zh: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空业是中美合作的关键领域
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普上周表示，中国已同意购买 200 架波音飞机，这是近十年来的第一笔重大订单。

items.title: JPMorgan's summer reading list for the wealthy includes books on AI, leadership and lemons
items.summary: JPMorgan’s annual summer reading list, which has become the go-to selection of beach books for the wealthy, has 14 titles this year.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通为富人准备的夏季阅读清单包括有关人工智能、领导力和柠檬的书籍
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通年度夏季读物清单已成为富人海滩读物的首选，今年有 14 本书。

items.title: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
items.summary: Castro and five others are charged with conspiracy to kill US nationals, murder, and destruction of aircraft
items.title_zh: 美国指控古巴劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀 1996 年击落两架飞机
items.summary_zh: 卡斯特罗和其他五人被指控密谋杀害美国公民、谋杀和毁坏飞机

items.title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
items.summary: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：普京受到习近平的中国欢迎，但未达成管道协议就回国
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司俄罗斯编辑表示，俄罗斯和中国在世界舞台上表现出并肩作战，但很明显存在局限性。

items.title: Murder or accident? Mystery of Mango tycoon's hiking death after son's arrest
items.summary: Isak Andic's son Jonathan denies involvement in the fatal fall of his father, who founded one of Europe's biggest clothing empires.
items.title_zh: 谋杀还是意外？芒果大亨儿子被捕后徒步死亡之谜
items.summary_zh: 伊萨克·安迪奇 (Isak Andic) 的儿子乔纳森 (Jonathan) 否认与他父亲的倒台有关，他的父亲创立了欧洲最大的服装帝国之一。

items.title: Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
items.summary: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.
items.title_zh: 奥地利前情报官员被判犯有俄罗斯间谍罪
items.summary_zh: 间谍丑闻再次引发人们对奥地利仍然是俄罗斯间谍活动温床的担忧。

items.title: US military jets and drones tracked near Cuba as tensions rise
items.summary: Tracking data shows several flights by US Navy reconnaissance jets and drones during the last week.
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，美国军用飞机和无人机在古巴附近被追踪
items.summary_zh: 跟踪数据显示，美国海军侦察机和无人机在上周进行了多次飞行。

items.title: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
items.summary: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
items.title_zh: 德国救援失败后，鲸鱼将被从丹麦岛上移走
items.summary_zh: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。

items.title: Barney Frank: One of the first openly gay US congressmen dies aged 86
items.summary: After a decades-long career in Congress, he spent his final weeks in hospice care at his home in Maine.
items.title_zh: 巴尼·弗兰克 (Barney Frank)：首批公开同性恋身份的美国国会议员之一去世，享年 86 岁
items.summary_zh: 在国会度过了数十年的职业生涯后，他在缅因州的家中度过了最后几周的临终关怀。

items.title: Days After Hosting Trump, Xi Serves Up Tea and Smiles to Putin
items.summary: During a state visit, the Chinese and Russian leaders cast themselves as a stabilizing force in a world thrown into tumult by Washington.
items.title_zh: 接待特朗普几天后，习近平向普京敬茶并微笑
items.summary_zh: 在国事访问期间，中国和俄罗斯领导人将自己视为华盛顿陷入动荡的世界中的稳定力量。

items.title: Cuba Says the Trump Administration Is Not Negotiating in Good Faith
items.summary: Cuba’s ambassador to the United Nations said in an interview that Havana wanted to talk but the Trump administration was creating pretexts for military action.
items.title_zh: 古巴称特朗普政府没有诚意进行谈判
items.summary_zh: 古巴驻联合国大使在接受采访时表示，哈瓦那希望进行对话，但特朗普政府正在为军事行动制造借口。

items.title: Ebola Crisis Sparks Debate Over Global Health Double Standards
items.summary: To some Africans, the claim that the continent’s largest health agency had already bungled its response scratched a familiar wound.
items.title_zh: 埃博拉危机引发关于全球卫生双重标准的争论
items.summary_zh: 对于一些非洲人来说，非洲大陆最大的卫生机构已经应对不力的说法触动了他们熟悉的伤口。

items.title: The French Civil Servant Accused of Drugging More Than 100 Women
items.summary: For years, prosecutors have accused Christian Nègre, once a senior official, of slipping diuretics into women’s drinks. Despite admitting some accusations in an interview with a French daily, he is yet to stand trial.
items.title_zh: 法国公务员被控对100多名女性下药
items.summary_zh: 多年来，检察官一直指控曾经担任高级官员的克里斯蒂安·内格雷(Christian Nègre)在女性饮料中添加利尿剂。尽管他在接受法国日报采访时承认了一些指控，但尚未接受审判。

items.title: Ebola Outbreak Is Unlikely to Become Global Threat, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, the World Health Organization’s director general, said the outbreak in central Africa was “not a pandemic emergency.”
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织：埃博拉疫情不太可能成为全球威胁说
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织总干事谭德塞表示，中部非洲的疫情“不是大流行紧急情况”。

items.title: Killing in Japan Stirs Fears of Tokuryu Crime Rings
items.summary: Four teenage boys were arrested in the killing of a woman at her home. The police say they might have been directed by a new type of transient criminal network known as tokuryu.
items.title_zh: 日本杀人事件引发人们对德龙​​犯罪团伙的担忧
items.summary_zh: 四名十几岁的男孩因在家中杀害一名妇女而被捕。警方表示，他们可能是受到一种名为“tokuryu”的新型临时犯罪网络的指挥。

items.title: China Confirms It Will Buy 200 Boeing Planes
items.summary: Beijing’s acknowledgment on Wednesday that tariffs were discussed in talks with President Trump signals it was prepared to push back if the U.S. revives duties.
items.title_zh: 中国确认将购买200架波音飞机
items.summary_zh: 北京周三承认在与特朗普总统的会谈中讨论了关税问题，这表明如果美国恢复关税，中国准备推迟。

items.title: Securitize remains in the red even as record quarter fuels public listing plans
items.summary: The tokenization platform reported record quarterly revenue but continued to post losses as it invested in growth and public-company preparations tied to its merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.
items.title_zh: 尽管创纪录的季度推动了公开上市计划，但证券化仍处于亏损状态
items.summary_zh: 该代币化平台公布了创纪录的季度收入，但由于投资于与 Cantor Equity Partners II 合并相关的增长和上市公司准备工作，因此继续出现亏损。

items.title: Crypto custody firm Copper is looking to sell the company for $500 million
items.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has been appointed to help with the sale, according to sources.
items.title_zh: 加密货币托管公司 Copper 寻求以 5 亿美元的价格出售该公司
items.summary_zh: 据消息人士透露，坎托·菲茨杰拉德已被任命协助出售。

items.title: Securitize posts record Q1 revenue, $3.4 billion in tokenized assets under management
items.summary: Securitize said it now services roughly 650 active funds and processed $1.9 billion in transaction volume during the quarter.
items.title_zh: Securitize 第一季度收入创纪录，管理的代币化资产达 34 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Securitize 表示，该公司目前为大约 650 只活跃基金提供服务，本季度处理的交易量为 19 亿美元。

items.title: Arbitrum-based derivatives venue Variational raises $50 million Series A led by Dragonfly
items.summary: Variational is positioning itself as a retail-friendly brokerage via its in-development Omni app, which will offer "zero-fee" trading.
items.title_zh: 基于 Arbitrum 的衍生品交易平台 Variational 获得由 Dragonfly 领投的 5000 万美元 A 轮融资
items.summary_zh: Variational 通过其正在开发的 Omni 应用程序将自己定位为零售友好型经纪公司，该应用程序将提供“零费用”交易。

items.title: Plume secures Bermuda license for what it calls first regulated onchain vault manager
items.summary: Plume's Bermuda subsidiary has secured a Class M BMA digital asset licence, allowing the firm offer regulated onchain vault manager services.
items.title_zh: Plume 获得百慕大许可，为其所谓的首个受监管的链上金库管理器
items.summary_zh: Plume 的百慕大子公司已获得 BMA M 级数字资产许可证，允许该公司提供受监管的链上金库管理服务。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作为所有公民带来 ChatGPT Plus
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作扩大人工智能的使用范围，提供 ChatGPT Plus 和培训，帮助公民培养实用的人工智能技能并负责任地使用人工智能。

items.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
items.summary: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 全新个人理财体验
items.summary_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中为美国 Pro 用户预览全新的个人财务体验。安全地连接您的财务账户，并获得基于您的财务背景、目标和优先事项的人工智能见解和指导。

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: Fine-Tuning NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 with LoRA/DoRA for Robot Video Generation
items.title_zh: 使用 LoRA/DoRA 微调 NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 以生成机器人视频

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title: vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL
items.title_zh: vLLM V0 到 V1：RL 修正前的正确性

items.title: Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 将 Benchmaxxer Repellant 添加到 Open ASR 排行榜

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 今年，在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们发布了 Gemini Omni、Google Antigravity、Universal Cart 等等。以下是亮点。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026
items.summary: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.
items.title_zh: 我们的 Google AI 订阅中的所有新内容均来自 I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 推出 100 美元的 AI Ultra 计划，此外，还为 Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra 订阅者提供新功能和福利。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
